insight_summary: More people are talking about St George right now. Lead with a clear opinion before the conversation gets crowded.

next_post.hook: Everyone says St George is fading — I think they are reading it wrong.

next_post.reason_it_will_perform_better: This works because it taps into debate, which consistently drives strong engagement with your audience, and uses a debate format they respond to well.
